steps.title: Use the choices or graph
steps.content: Because all choices are ordered pairs, the fastest method is to check which point satisfies both equations. In Desmos, graph the two lines and read their intersection.

steps.title: Confirm the ordered pair
steps.content: The solution is $(15,3)$. It checks because $15+3=18$ and $5(3)=15$. That matches choice A.
